subject: fix(theme): use named import for Uniwind — fixes theme switching
body:
The `import Uniwind from 'uniwind'` was a default import, but the
package only exports `Uniwind` as a named export. This made `Uniwind`
undefined at runtime, so every `Uniwind.setTheme()` call silently threw
a TypeError. The CSS class on <html> never changed, keeping className-
based styles (backgrounds, text — "pretty much everything") stuck on
the initial system-scheme theme (synthwave via @variant dark).

Also added a try/catch fallback in `applyTheme` that manually updates
the CSS class on <html> if Uniwind.setTheme ever fails again, so theme
switching degrades gracefully instead of silently breaking.

Tags: bugfix, theme, styling
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
